productDisplayName: Puma Men White Aquil Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteGet used to superior comfort and performance during your run with these shoes from puma. These shoes work as hard as you do to help you run better and look great doing it. Team these with jeans and tees for a casual look when you're not out training.Product DetailsMesh upper with synthetic overlays, has synthetic twill tape lacesFormstripe on the sideComfort insole with mesh tongue to ensure a snug, comfortable FitTextile lining for added comfortLightweight rubber midsoleOutsole reinforced onto the toe to act as a toe guardMade of high traction rubber and has a scooped midfootMultidirectional lugs, suction points and flex grooves on the outsoleMaterial and CareMesh, syntheticRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
